summary: Iteration 61 - Product Tagging, Persistent Bookmarks, Follow/Message, Stripe Checkout. All 15 backend API tests PASSED. All frontend features verified working. Product tagging shows tagged products with 'Comprar' link in feed. Bookmarks persist in MongoDB. Follow/Message buttons work on Discover and User Profile pages.

minor.issue: Returns 'Method Not Allowed' - cart clear may need POST method or different endpoint

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login (customer) - PASS
Backend: POST /api/auth/login (producer) - PASS
Backend: GET /api/post-products/search - PASS (returns products for tagging)
Backend: GET /api/post-products/search?q=aceite - PASS (filtered search)
Backend: Product response has product_id, name, price, currency, image - PASS
Backend: POST /api/posts (text only) - PASS (creates post without product tag)
Backend: POST /api/posts with product_id - PASS (tags product in post)
Backend: GET /api/feed returns is_bookmarked field - PASS
Backend: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/bookmark - PASS (toggles bookmark)
Backend: Bookmark persists in feed after toggle - PASS
Backend: POST /api/users/{user_id}/follow - PASS
Backend: DELETE /api/users/{user_id}/follow - PASS
Backend: POST /api/users/{self}/follow - PASS (correctly rejected)
Backend: POST /api/internal-chat/start-conversation - PASS
Backend: POST /api/payments/create-checkout - PASS (returns Stripe URL)
Backend: GET /api/feed includes tagged_product in posts - PASS
Frontend: Homepage shows tagged product card with 'Comprar' link - PASS
Frontend: Producer sees 'Producto' tag button in post creator - PASS
Frontend: Customer does NOT see 'Producto' tag button - PASS
Frontend: Product selector shows products with images and prices - PASS
Frontend: Bookmark button persists state (filled when bookmarked) - PASS
Frontend: Bookmark persists after page refresh - PASS
Frontend: Follow button works on /discover page - PASS
Frontend: Message button on /discover opens chat - PASS
Frontend: User profile page loads at /user/{userId} - PASS
Frontend: Follow/unfollow on user profile works - PASS
Frontend: Message button on user profile opens chat - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/post-products/search correctly scoped: producers see their own products, admins see all
POST /api/posts properly resolves tagged_product with product_id, name, price, currency, image
GET /api/feed enriches posts with is_bookmarked by checking post_bookmarks collection
POST /api/posts/{post_id}/bookmark correctly toggles using upsert/delete pattern
TaggedProductCard component in SocialFeed.js correctly displays product with 'Comprar' link
canTagProducts check (producer/influencer/admin) correctly gates the tag button
ProductSelector component shows products with images and prices in dropdown
Stripe checkout returns valid checkout.stripe.com URL
Internal chat start-conversation creates or returns existing conversation
seed_data_creation: Test posts created: TEST_post_without_tag_*, TEST_tagged_post_* with product tags
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 tested new features: 1) Product tagging in posts - producers/influencers/admins can tag products using GET /api/post-products/search and POST /api/posts with product_id FormData field. Tagged products show as clickable cards with 'Comprar' link. 2) Persistent bookmarks - POST /api/posts/{post_id}/bookmark toggles bookmark, GET /api/feed returns is_bookmarked. 3) Follow/Message on Discover page and User Profile page work correctly. 4) Stripe checkout returns valid Stripe URL. Customer has email_verified=true and locale={country:ES}.

product_tagging.feed_display: Tagged product card with image, name, price, 'Comprar' link - Working
product_tagging.role_gating: Only producers/influencers/admins see tag button - Working

persistent_bookmarks.ui_persistence: Bookmark state persists after refresh - Working

mocked_api_notes: No mocked APIs - all features use real backend implementation
